name: sheet
description: A slide-over panel anchored to any edge of the screen for detail views, forms and filters — a modal dialog with focus trapping, focus restore, Escape and backdrop dismissal and body scroll lock built in.

notes: role=dialog with aria-modal, labelled by its title (or an aria-label fallback)
Focus moves into the panel on open and is restored to the trigger on close
Focus is trapped while open; Tab and Shift+Tab wrap inside the panel
Escape and a backdrop click request close via onOpenChange
The body is scroll-locked while open; the slide is disabled under prefers-reduced-motion

intents: a slide-over / drawer panel from the side of the screen
a modal side panel for a detail view, form or filters
an accessible drawer with focus trap and scroll lock
